user_request: Add support for detecting TypeScript interface changes (interface keyword, type aliases with =) as named symbols alongside the existing function/class detection.
bob_contribution: Added two regex patterns to SYMBOL_PATTERNS: r'^[+-].*\binterface\s+(\w+)' for interface declarations and r'^[+-].*\btype\s+(\w+)\s*=\s*' for type aliases. Also fixed group index handling for multi-group patterns.
